titleStmt.title: SII 36.234: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 234. (A.R. No. 234 of 1910.) IḶAMBAYAṄGŌṬṬŪR, SRIPERUMBUDUR TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the west base of the temple of Dēvanāyakasvāmi.

summary.p: Incomplete and built in. Seems to refer to an earlier assignment of land as tirunāmattukkāṇi by Sambuvarājaṉ to the sabhā of Kōṭṭūr alias Chōḻavichchādira-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Kaṉṟūr-nāḍu, a subdivision of Maṇaviṟ-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam. The land, measuring an extent of 11(1/4) (vēlis) was sold for a consideration of 200 paḻaṅ-kācus.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvaṉac cakkaravarttikaḷ vīrāvapiṣekamum vijaiyāvapiṣekamum paṇṇiyaruḷiya śrī tiripuvaṉa vīratevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 8 vatu Āṉi mā
sattu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu maṇaviṟ koṭṭattuk kaṉṟūr nāṭṭu koṭṭūrāṉa coḻaviccātirac caturvetimaṅkalattu Uṭaiyār tiruvilampayaṅko
ṭṭūruṭaiya nāyanār koyilātikāla caṇṭeśvararom Iṉṉāyanāṟku muṉṉāḷile ceṅkeṇiyammaiyappaṉ vaṉṉiyaṉāyaṉ campuvarājaṉ Ivvūṟ sapaiyār pakkal tirunāmat
tukkāṇiyākak koṇṭu variyiliṭṭa nilamāvatu Ūruṇi tū ta vatikku vaṭakku Ērikaraikkuk kiḻakkuk kammāṉ koṭṭur Ellaikkut teṟku naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam patinoṉṟekā
lukku mivarkaḷ kaikkoṇṭa paḻaṅkācu Irunūṟu Ippa ṉṉilam paṇṭāṭu paḻanaṭaiye Ivvūṟ sabhaiyāṟkku kāṇi Ākak kuṭuttu kaṭamai
Digital edition of SII 36.234 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
